description.zh: 网鼎杯CTF玄武组多道Web题目的解题记录，包括SSRF漏洞利用和Java路由绕过等。
description.en: Writeup of multiple web challenges from Wangding CTF Xuanwu Group, covering SSRF exploitation and Java route bypass.

content.zh: 分析网鼎杯玄武组的Web题目
content.en: Analyze Wangding CTF Xuanwu Group web challenges

annotation.zh: 用户请求分析网鼎杯Web题目
annotation.en: User requests analysis of Wangding CTF web challenges

content.zh: 网鼎杯玄武组有多个Web题目。首先分析web237-openlitespeed这道SSRF题目。
content.en: Wangding CTF Xuanwu Group has multiple web challenges. First analyzing web237-openlitespeed SSRF challenge.

content.zh: 目标页面存在curl_opt参数，可以控制curl选项进行SSRF攻击
content.en: Target page has curl_opt parameter, can control curl options for SSRF attack

content.zh: 发现PHP curl_setopt可控，存在SSRF漏洞。尝试通过SSRF写入webshell。
content.en: Found PHP curl_setopt is controllable, SSRF vulnerability exists. Trying to write webshell via SSRF.

content.zh: 尝试通过file://协议写shell失败，需要寻找其他利用方式
content.en: Attempt to write shell via file:// protocol failed, need other exploitation methods

content.zh: 接下来分析web441-ezJava题目，这是一道Java反序列化题目，需要绕过路由过滤。
content.en: Next analyzing web441-ezJava challenge, a Java deserialization problem requiring route bypass.

annotation.en: Assistant turns to analyze Java challenge

content.zh: 使用/;Evil绕过startsWith检查，成功访问Evil端点
content.en: Using /;Evil bypasses startsWith check, successfully accessed Evil endpoint

content.zh: 成功绕过路由保护。利用base参数传入恶意序列化对象，获取flag。
content.en: Successfully bypassed route protection. Using base parameter to inject malicious serialized object, captured flag.
